author: ahamlat
content:
<@412614104222531604> <@199561711278227457> I would like to confirm the size of a debug trace output with memory enabled on this block [#24833917](https://etherscan.io/block/24833917) (hex. 0x017AEF7D) on mainnet. Do you have available archive node other than besu to run the request ? (the output should be very big)  🙏🏼 
```
curl --location 'http://rpc-endpoint' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "method": "debug_traceBlockByNumber",
    "params": [
        "0x017AEF7D",
        {
            "enableMemory": true,
            "disableStorage": false,
            "disableStack": false
        }
    ],
    "id": 1
}'
```
